rag_rules: Place generated AGREE annex blocks in the target component implementation scope after subcomponents and connections
Use only visible identifiers in generated contracts
Preserve existing AADL architecture during annex insertion
generic_rules: Maintain consistent scope and visibility when inserting annex blocks
Avoid using subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Use AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Omit range comparisons or 0/1 equality over non-numeric data ports
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested `if ... then ... else` for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) in contracts
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Avoid placing input envelope assumptions or output range guarantees in component type annexes without concrete bounds or visible relations
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range comparisons
